name: SSL 证书监控
description: 检查 SSL 证书过期时间并告警

config.script: const m = body.match(/notAfter=(.*)/); if(!m) return 'unknown'; const d = new Date(m[1]); const days = Math.ceil((d - new Date()) / 86400000); return {expires: m[1], days_left: days}

config.title: SSL 证书告警
config.text: {{params.domain}} 证书将在 {{parse.days_left}} 天后过期
